ground_truth.title: Classic Percale Core Sheet Set
ground_truth.main_content:
Size Guide

Our Fitted Sheets are designed to fit mattresses up to 16" deep, with 12"-16" being the best fit.

Duvet Cover (W x L) | Fitted Sheet (W x L x H) | Flat Sheet (W x L) | Pillowcases (W x L)
Twin: 64x90 | 39x75x16 | 71x98 | 20x27
Twin XL: 64x90 | 39x80x16 | 71x104 | 20x27
Full: 90x90 | 54x75x16 | 86x98 | 20x27
Queen: 90x90 | 60x80x16 | 92x104 | 20x27
King: 106x90 | 76x80x16 | 110x104 | 20x37
Cali King: 106x90 | 72x84x16 | 110x104 | 20x37

OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100

This product was tested for harmful substances and certified to meet the strict global safety criteria of the OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100, assuring safety for you and your family.

Certification number: 17.HUS.08214.Hohenstein.

Meet Our Sheets

Luxe Sateen
Smooth, soft, lustrous
Ideal for: Most sleepers
Fabric Content: 100% long-staple cotton
Thread Count: 480 TC
Sustainability: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100 Certified

Classic Percale
Crisp, cool, matte
Ideal for: Hot sleepers
Fabric Content: 100% long-staple cotton
Thread Count: 270 TC
Sustainability: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100 Certified

Washed Classic Percale
Cool, soft, relaxed
Ideal for: Year-round comfort
Fabric Content: 100% long-staple cotton
Thread Count: 270 TC
Sustainability: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100 Certified

Washed European Linen
Soft, airy, relaxed
Ideal for: Warm days or cool nights
Fabric Content: 100% Certified European Flax
Thread Count: 155 GSM
Sustainability: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100 and European Flax Certified

Organic Cotton
Crisp, breathable, relaxed
Ideal for: Most sleepers
Fabric Content: 100% organic cotton
Weight: 270 TC
Sustainability: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100 and 100% Organic Cotton

Heathered Cashmere
Warm, soft, luxurious
Ideal for: Those looking for a superior snuggle
Fabric Content: 95% cotton, 5% cashmere
Weight: 125 GSM
Sustainability: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100 Certified

Brushed Flannel
Cozy, breathable, nostalgic
Ideal for: Cold sleepers or cooler climates
Fabric Content: 100% cotton
Weight: 140 GSM
Sustainability: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100 Certified

Why Classic Percale?

100% Long-Staple Cotton for lasting comfort

Cool. Crisp. Refreshing. Award-winning.

OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100 Certified
